## Quality Checklist

- [ ] User-facing behavior is described clearly.
- [ ] Security impact was considered, including secrets, auth, and data exposure.
- [ ] Performance impact was considered for startup, runtime, bundle size, or query cost.
- [ ] Logs, errors, and operational visibility are useful enough to debug failures.
- [ ] UI changes were checked for keyboard access, responsive layout, and readable states.
- [ ] Tests, smoke checks, or manual verification are listed below.
